# CHANGELOG - 1.1.0

- Add settings tab
 - Toggle display of the root folder node (`/`) (from
 [#6](https://github.com/ratibus11/folders2graph/issues/6)) (_displayed by default_)
 - Supports French and English. Feel free to suggest new translations!
